_notes: Counterfactual = replay-based CF rollouts decomposer. Canonical-vocabulary copy of configs/method_hgpo_counterfactual.json (post-fix v5 settings). For each (i, t) we sample N=2 alt actions from the policy at state_t, complete a 3-turn greedy rollout, and emit r_t = R - mean(R_alt). n_turns_per_traj=0 (all turns) per the post-mortem of seed11_round00 — subsampling injects structured zeros that pollute compute_turn_advantages's per-position normalization. Cost = K*N*T_bar = 4*2*5 = 40 alt rollouts/group. lambda_consistency=0 because the CF deltas don't satisfy the §3.2 sum-to-R invariant. skip_if_zero_R=true halves wall-clock on early training. Populates methods_comparison.json::Counterfactual.
